jsonLd.title: Pepperfry is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Pepperfry. We are on the lookout for a dedicated E-commerce Executive to strengthen our Mumbai-based team.

About Pepperfry:
Pepperfry is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pepperfry!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
